about_name.description: Name of the 'About' section, where users can see information about the extension

about_changeLog.description: Link to the extension's list of changes per release

about_sourceCode.description: Link to the extension's source code and its license type (MIT)

about_support.description: Link to the extension's support site

contextMenu_corralTab.description: Label for context menu item that closes the clicked tab and adds it to the corral
contextMenu_corralTab.message: Tutup tab dan simpan URL dengan segera

options_option_autoLockException_label.description: Label preceding input for adding whitelist exception
options_option_autoLockException_label.message: Allow auto-closing of whitelisted tabs with URLs containing:

options_option_autoLockException_add.description: Button label for adding a whitelist exception

options_option_autoLockException_example.description: Example describing how whitelist exceptions work
options_option_autoLockException_example.message: Example: "cnn" would match every whitelisted page on "https://www.cnn.com" and any URL with "cnn" anywhere in it.

options_option_autoLockException_empty.description: Message shown when there are no whitelist exceptions
options_option_autoLockException_empty.message: No whitelist exceptions yet. Use the form above to add some.

tabLock_lockedReason_whitelisted.description: Label for a tab locked because it matches the whitelist
